chapter_title.en: Chapter on Categories Upon Whom Zakat is Obligatory

text: رِوَايَةِ وَهْبِ بْنِ وَهْبٍ اَلْقُرَشِيِّ عَنْ اَلصَّادِقِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ عَنْ آبَائِهِ عَنْ عَلِيٍّ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ: «لَيْسَ فِي مَالِ اَلْمُكَاتَبِ زَكَاةٌ ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1636 - In a narration from Wahb ibn Wahb al-Qurashi, from Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) from his forefathers, from Imam Ali ibn Abi Talib (as) who said:
"There is no Zakat on the wealth of a mukatib (a slave under a contract for emancipation)."
